MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Navruz Avloni, Esq., specially appearing for Jordan Mallin, defendant and moving party / Mark Basil Pappas, Esq. (707-745-8206) for Sophie Pappas, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JORDAN MALLIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED as to punitive damages and GRANTED as to request for attorney's fees. Prevailing party to submit proposed order approved as to form. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Navruz Avloni, Esq., specially appearing for Jordan Mallin, defendant and moving party / Mark Basil Pappas, Esq. (707-745-8206) for Sophie Pappas, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - After hearing the oral arguments, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JORDAN MALLIN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT as to the 1st and 3rd c/a for breach of contract and breach of covenant of good faith - OVERRULED, complaint sufficiently alleges breach of no-sublet provision; as to the 2nd, 4th, 8th c/a for promissory estoppel, common counts, and unjust enrichment - OVERRULED, all elements sufficiently plead, including a promise relied upon by Plaintiff in entering the contract for lower rent; as to the 5th, 6th and 7th causes of action or fraud - OVERRULED, fraud is sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to submit proposed order approved as to form. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Apr-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JORDAN MALLIN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is transferred to be heard in Department 501 on April 18 at 9:30 a.m. Cases related to tenancies are heard in that department. (In addition, the plaintiff shall provide a courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
